docket_entries.description: DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONT. SUBMITTED FOR SIGNATURE.
HEARING DATE ON IFP FOR PLAINTIFF ON APRIL 9, 1998 AT 11:00 AM ORDERED BY COMM. KAPLAN.NOTICE SENT TO THE PLAINTIFF (COPY OF ORDER).
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-17-1997, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-24-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-24-1997, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO DEC-18-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ, MIGUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEDBETTER, BETRISHA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
IT IS ORDERED THAT A HEARING BE HELD ON 03/19/98 AT 11:00 AM IN ROOM 506 FOR ORDER ON APPLICATAION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COST ORDERED DENIED. APPLICANT FAILED TO APPEAR ON HEARING DATE. COPY OF ORDER SENT TO APPLICANT.
LETTER SENT TO PLTFF, NOTIFYING HIM OF DENIAL OF FEE WAIVER APPLICATION AND REQUESTING $71 TO PROCESS APPEAL, OTHERWISE WILL BE VOIDED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-18-1997, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-29-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
THE SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENTIARY CONFLICT TO BE RESOLV- ED BY THE HEARING IS (SPECIFY) INCONSISTENT AND INCOMPLETE INFORMATION ON FINANCIAL STATEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DIAZ, MIGUEL AS TO DEFENDANT LEDBETTER, BETRISHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LEDBETTER, BETRISHA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DIAZ, MIGUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

CROSS DEFT, MIGUEL DIAZ, REQUEST FOR A FEE WAIVER SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APROVAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LEDBETTER, BETRISHA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT DIAZ, MIGUEL $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
